intro: Conospermum leianthum, commonly known as the lemon-scented conospermum, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The bioactive constituents of C. leianthum include sesquiterpenes, diterpenes, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
